## 变更说明 / Summary


## 类型 / Type

- [ ] 规则新增或修改 / Rule add or change
- [ ] Skill 内容 / Skill content
- [ ] 校验工具或测试 / Tooling or tests
- [ ] 文档 / Documentation
- [ ] 示例 / Examples

## 检查项 / Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repo.py` 通过 / passes
- [ ] `pytest` 通过 / passes
- [ ] `python scripts/check_links.py` 通过 / passes
- [ ] 新增规则有明确失败模式与来源等级（H1–H4）/ New rules have a clear failure mode and source tier
- [ ] 未把项目建议冒充官方规范 / Project recommendations are not presented as official
